heroAccent: Here's why you can trust this project.
heroLead: Behind Memora stands a real person with 6+ years in system integration, $12M+ in delivered projects, and a habit of making the complex — clear.
introLarge: This isn't another "self-improvement project" put together over a weekend.
introText: Behind Memora Solutions is Sergey Maklakov — a person who has spent the last 6.5 years taking on technically complex challenges and delivering results.
s1Title: What it looked like in the real world
s1Text: Delivering equipment to a historic university building where you can't scratch the staircase.
s1Hint: Hover over a project to learn more
s2Title: 5 tons of metal across the country
s2Text: Ordering a 5-ton overhead crane in Chelyabinsk and shipping it to Saint Petersburg at year's end. December. Deadline. To a place where the elevator doesn't reach.
s3Text: Building over a thousand high-performance computers for engineering bureaus from the ground up. Each one tailored to a specific client's requirements.
s4Text: Building automation systems for residential complexes. Developing a platform that unifies dozens of building engineering systems into a single interface.
s5Title: Group VR in a single bus
s5Text: Everyone in different places — but in one shared space. Technology that connects people.
phil1: But in parallel — I've been reading, practicing, researching. Meditation, philosophy, memory work, mindfulness, Eckhart Tolle and Buddhist practices. Not as a hobby, but as a second language for explaining the world.
phil2: Memora Solutions is where two worlds intersect: the technical and the philosophical.
phil3: There won't be any fluff or motivational clichés here. Only what actually works — tested on myself and those around me.
s6Title: The people who make it possible
s6Text:
If you just want to read — welcome.
If you want to work together — even better.
s7Intro: We don't just execute projects — we build systems that make each next project faster and more reliable than the last.
ctaText1: If you have an idea, a challenge, or just a question — reach out. I'm interested in working with people who build something meaningful.
ctaText2: Open to collaborations, consulting, and joint projects — especially where someone is needed who can untangle complexity and explain it simply.

scene.logisticsCaption: December. Deadline. Five tons onto a roof the lift can't reach.
